body: Build 0110. Three horror mechanics from TYLER S10E07/E08: MechanismReading Goetia Hz HUD, boss question-state (33% threshold, zero-taxonomy, observation point), al-Waqfa/al-idrak al-muttasil cutscene slides. Commit 2f5387b.
